scoreThreshold.title: Fallback sybil-score threshold
scoreThreshold.description: Used only when the address has no DROP/REVIEW/KEEP decision on record (e.g. a cluster_only-mode analysis). Below this raw sybil_score (0-100) counts as valid.

blockReview.title: Block REVIEW-decision addresses too
blockReview.description: By default only DROP blocks eligibility; REVIEW (uncertain) is treated as valid. Set true for stricter gating.

unscoredIsValid.title: Treat never-analyzed addresses as valid
unscoredIsValid.description: An address SybilShield has never scored is unknown, not guilty. Set false to require every voter to already have a SybilShield score.

apiUrl.title: SybilShield API URL override
apiUrl.description: For self-hosted SybilShield deployments. Defaults to the public sandbox.
